final:
module shift_register (
    input obf_clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    
    always @(posedge obf_clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            data_out <= 16'b0;
        end else if (load) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end else begin
            data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[15:1]};
        end
    end
endmodule
